title: Box update status item (GET /box-updates)
description: One box's update/security posture — exactly one row per box. As-built source of truth: the `box_update_status` table (BOX_STATUS_DDL in /home/docker/update-collector/src/lib/server/box-status.js), written by the update collector (Action1 endpoints + TrueNAS WebSocket poller; collector/normalize.js) directly or via the agent-API op box_status_upsert. All timestamps are stored as ISO-8601 UTC strings and served as RFC 3339 date-time. `raw_ref` points at the source-tool reference behind this row; the second-pass package/vuln detail is served by GET /box-updates/{box_id}/raw (box-update-raw.schema.json). Filters: `status`, `os_family`, plus the shared limit/cursor/since. Consumers MUST ignore unknown fields.

box_id.description: Stable box id, namespaced by source (e.g. 'a1:<endpoint-id>', 'truenas:<hostname>'). Primary key.

hostname.description: Box hostname as reported by the source tool.

os_family.description: windows | macos | linux | truenas | other lowercased platform; null when unknown.

os_version.description: Full OS/version string from the source; null when unknown.

agent_vs_agentless.description: Whether the box runs a management agent or is polled agentlessly.

pending_updates_count.description: Pending updates; null = could not be collected (status will be error_collecting, never falsely green).

security_critical_count.description: Pending updates whose severity is Critical/High/Important; null = unknown.

vuln_count.description: Known vulnerabilities on the box; null = the source does not report vulns.

reboot_required.description: 1 = reboot pending, 0 = no, null = unknown (as-built INTEGER 0/1 CHECK, passed through).

last_checked_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC — when the source last checked the box; null = unknown.

last_applied_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC — when updates were last applied; null = source has no clean per-box signal (honest null, v1).

update_channel.description: Update channel/train (e.g. 'windows-update', 'os-package-manager', a TrueNAS train); null = unknown.

apply_mode.description: How updates get applied to this box; null = unknown.

status.description: Derived posture (collector/normalize.js deriveStatus): overdue when security-critical pending or oldest pending >14 days; error_collecting when counts are unknowable — loud, never falsely green.

raw_ref.description: Opaque reference to the source-tool record behind this row (e.g. the Action1 endpoint self-URL); the key GET /box-updates/{box_id}/raw expands.

updated_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC — when the collector last upserted this row.
